aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place but lacks depth in content, keyword optimization, and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Expand service pages with detailed content and relevant keywords.
Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve engagement.
Implement location-based keywords to target local search queries.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and complete information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized, with no reviews and incomplete business information, which affects local search visibility.
critical_issues: Incomplete business information (e.g., missing business hours, services, photos).

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across directories, which can confuse search engines and affect local SEO.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories to ensure consistency.
Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.

schema_gaps: Service schema for specific HVAC services (e.g., heating installation, air conditioning repair).
Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.
FAQ schema to address common customer questions about HVAC services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed, keyword-rich content on service pages.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local customers searching for specific HVAC services in San Diego.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding location-based keywords and detailed service descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating blog content on HVAC maintenance tips and local San Diego climate considerations to establish expertise and improve search visibility.
